entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH NOW IN EFFECT THROUGH SUNDAY MORNING

entry.data:
SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY THIS MORNING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL THIS MORNING
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE EVENING
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
LOWS AROUND 70
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

CLEAR, HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
